description_long: This is a modern two-story bungalow with a flat roof and a symmetrical facade. The front features a wide balcony with white railings above a covered porch, flanked by two palm trees and a paved driveway. The rear of the property includes a swimming pool, a patio area with an umbrella, and a parked car, all surrounded by manicured landscaping and several trees. Large windows are arranged in a regular pattern on both floors, providing ample natural light. The exterior is finished in a combination of dark and white tones, giving it a sleek, contemporary appearance. The property is set on a rectangular lot with defined walkways and open green spaces.
description: A modern two-story bungalow with a flat roof, symmetrical white railings, large windows, a front porch, and a backyard pool with patio landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, two palm trees, paved driveway, and symmetrical balcony with white railings.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, parked car, and the regular arrangement of windows along the side facade.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard pool, patio with umbrella, and additional landscaping with trees and a car.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view focusing on the pool, patio area, umbrella, and the back of the bungalow with visible balcony and windows.
